import pandas as pd
from forecast_evaluation.data.loader import load_fer_forecasts, load_fer_outturns

# Load the full datasets
forecasts = load_fer_forecasts\(minimal=False\)
outturns = load_fer_outturns\(minimal=False\)

print\("=== FORECASTS DATA ==="\)
print\(f"Shape: {forecasts.shape}"\)
print\(f"Columns: {list\(forecasts.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(forecasts['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Sources: {sorted\(forecasts['source'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Metrics: {sorted\(forecasts['metric'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(forecasts['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {forecasts['date'].min\(\)} to {forecasts['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Vintage range: {forecasts['vintage_date'].min\(\)} to {forecasts['vintage_date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nFirst few rows:"\)
print\(forecasts.head\(\)\)

print\("\\n=== OUTTURNS DATA ==="\)
print\(f"Shape: {outturns.shape}"\)
print\(f"Columns: {list\(outturns.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(outturns['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Metrics: {sorted\(outturns['metric'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(outturns['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {outturns['date'].min\(\)} to {outturns['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Vintage range: {outturns['vintage_date'].min\(\)} to {outturns['vintage_date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nFirst few rows:"\)
print\(outturns.head\(\)\)

import pandas as pd
from forecast_evaluation.data.loader import load_fer_forecasts, load_fer_outturns

# Load the full datasets
forecasts = load_fer_forecasts\(minimal=False\)
outturns = load_fer_outturns\(minimal=False\)

print\("=== FORECASTS DATA ==="\)
print\(f"Shape: {forecasts.shape}"\)
print\(f"Columns: {list\(forecasts.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"Data types:\\n{forecasts.dtypes}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(forecasts['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Sources: {sorted\(forecasts['source'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(forecasts['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {forecasts['date'].min\(\)} to {forecasts['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Vintage range: {forecasts['vintage_date'].min\(\)} to {forecasts['vintage_date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nFirst few rows:"\)
print\(forecasts.head\(10\)\)

print\("\\n=== OUTTURNS DATA ==="\)
print\(f"Shape: {outturns.shape}"\)
print\(f"Columns: {list\(outturns.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"Data types:\\n{outturns.dtypes}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(outturns['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(outturns['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {outturns['date'].min\(\)} to {outturns['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Vintage range: {outturns['vintage_date'].min\(\)} to {outturns['vintage_date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nFirst few rows:"\)
print\(outturns.head\(10\)\)
EOFPYTHON)

Bash(cd /Users/paullabonne/Repos/forecast_evaluation && python3 << 'EOFPYTHON'
from forecast_evaluation import ForecastData

# Initialize with FER data
fd = ForecastData\(load_fer=True\)

print\("=== FORECAST DATA \(after ForecastData processing\) ==="\)
print\(f"Forecasts shape: {fd._forecasts.shape}"\)
print\(f"Forecasts columns: {list\(fd._forecasts.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(fd._forecasts['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Sources: {sorted\(fd._forecasts['unique_id'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Metrics: {sorted\(fd._forecasts['metric'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(fd._forecasts['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nForecasts sample:"\)
print\(fd._forecasts.head\(10\)\)

print\("\\n=== OUTTURN DATA \(after ForecastData processing\) ==="\)
print\(f"Outturns shape: {fd._outturns.shape}"\)
print\(f"Outturns columns: {list\(fd._outturns.columns\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nVariables: {sorted\(fd._outturns['variable'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Metrics: {sorted\(fd._outturns['metric'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Frequencies: {sorted\(fd._outturns['frequency'].unique\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"\\nOutturns sample:"\)
print\(fd._outturns.head\(10\)\)

print\("\\n=== MAIN TABLE ==="\)
if fd._main_table is not None and len\(fd._main_table\) > 0:
    print\(f"Main table shape: {fd._main_table.shape}"\)
    print\(f"Main table columns: {list\(fd._main_table.columns\)}"\)
    print\(f"\\nMain table sample:"\)
    print\(fd._main_table.head\(10\)\)
EOFPYTHON)
